name: feature-flow
description: Feature delivery workflow skills for Claude Code: live implementation status tracking, caller-facing API contracts, interactive HTML test plans, automated test-plan execution, and non-technical feature briefs for PO/QC.

plugins.name: feature-flow
plugins.description: Bundle of 9 skills closing the loop problem → plan → implement+review → API docs → test plan → auto-test → stakeholder brief → deep-understanding handoff, with a Claude⇄Codex peer-debate trio at the front: impl-status, api-contract-writer, test-case-writer, service-test-runner, feature-brief, comprehension-coach, problem-solver, implementation-planner, plan-implementer.
